basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Cross Disciplinary Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Cross Disciplinary Research Fellow (CDRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of BITS Pilani. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani Cross Disciplinary Research Fellow (CDRF) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech. in Electrical Engineering or Power Electronics or Electrical Drives or Energy Systems, B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering or equivalent
qualification.details: M.E./M.Tech. in Electrical Engineering or Power Electronics or Electrical Drives or Energy Systems; B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering or equivalent

selection_process: Resume Shortlisting Telephonic/Audio-visual Interview Final Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BITS Pilani Cross Disciplinary Research Fellow (CDRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BITS Pilani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BITS Pilani Cross Disciplinary Research Fellow (CDRF) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BITS Pilani to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani Cross Disciplinary Research Fellow (CDRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani CDRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Cross Disciplinary Research Fellow (CDRF) position at BITS Pilani is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the CDRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess an M.E./M.Tech. in Electrical Engineering or Power Electronics or Electrical Drives or Energy Systems, or a B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering or an equivalent degree.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Cross Disciplinary Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 42,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the CDRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Cross Disciplinary Research Fellow (CDRF) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the BITS Pilani CDRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves resume shortlisting, followed by a telephonic/audio-visual interview, and finally a final interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Applications for the BITS Pilani Cross Disciplinary Research Fellow (CDRF) post must be submitted online.

faq.question: Q8. Where is BITS Pilani located?
faq.answer: BITS Pilani is located in Pilani, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Cross Disciplinary Research Fellow (CDRF) position is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, which will provide all the detailed information.
